title: Getting started with rwevalidate
text: cdm_connect() opens PostgreSQL connection verifies required clinical tables exist cdm_schema returning. Many CDM builds split-schema: clinical tables one schema vocabulary (concept, concept_ancestor) another. Pass vocabulary schema via vocab_schema (default "vocab").
code: library(rwevalidate)  con <- cdm_connect(   host       = "localhost",   port       = 5432,   dbname     = "your_db",   user       = "your_user",   password   = "your_password",   cdm_schema = "mimic_cdm" )

title: Getting started with rwevalidate
text: rwevalidate reads cohort table columns subject_id, cohort_definition_id, cohort_start_date, cohort_end_date. example, heart-failure cohort using SNOMED concept 316139 descendants:
code: DBI::dbExecute(con, "   CREATE TABLE results.my_cohort AS   SELECT person_id AS subject_id, 1 AS cohort_definition_id,          MIN(condition_start_date) AS cohort_start_date,          MAX(condition_end_date)   AS cohort_end_date   FROM mimic_cdm.condition_occurrence   WHERE condition_concept_id IN (     SELECT descendant_concept_id FROM vocab.concept_ancestor     WHERE ancestor_concept_id = 316139)   GROUP BY person_id")

title: Getting started with rwevalidate
text: validate_cohort() runs modules writes report. Supply open con connection arguments directly. writes validation_report.html validation_results.json output_dir, returns list results (per-module output), report (paths + traffic-light summary), flags.
code: results <- validate_cohort(   cdm_schema    = "mimic_cdm",   cohort_table  = "results.my_cohort",   cohort_id     = 1,   concept_ids   = 316139,   # enables Module 1 (concept coverage)   comparator_id = 2,        # enables Module 4 (covariate feasibility)   vocab_schema  = "vocab",   output_dir    = "./validation_report",   con           = con ) results$report$check_summary   # one row per check: pass / warn / fail results$flags                  # all WARN:/FAIL: messages

title: Getting started with rwevalidate
text: module also callable need one view.
code: run_attrition(con, "mimic_cdm", "results.my_cohort", cohort_id = 1,               vocab_schema = "vocab")  run_density(con, "mimic_cdm", "results.my_cohort", cohort_id = 1)  run_concepts(con, "mimic_cdm", "results.my_cohort", cohort_id = 1,              concept_ids = 316139, vocab_schema = "vocab")  run_covariates(con, "mimic_cdm", "results.my_cohort", cohort_id = 1,                comparator_id = 2, vocab_schema = "vocab")

title: Getting started with rwevalidate
text: Every check returns "pass" (green), "warn" (amber), "fail" (red). Thresholds documented arguments – example prior-observation coverage warns 70% fails 50%, covariates |SMD| > 0.1 flagged imbalanced. Tune study’s requirements.
code: cdm_disconnect(con)

title: Validation: cohorts, datasets, and methodology
text: MIMIC-IV requires PhysioNet credentialing; MIMIC builds local. Eunomia public downloads demand via Eunomia package.

title: Validation: cohorts, datasets, and methodology
text: Cohorts spanning every index domain plus empty-cohort edge case, run validate_cohort() complement comparator. ran without error; empty cohort aborts clear message (intended guard).
code: kbl(data.frame(   cohort = c("Heart failure","Atrial fibrillation","Obesity","Acetaminophen",              "Oxycodone","Mech ventilation","CBC lymphocytes","Empty (edge)"),   domain = c("condition","condition","condition","drug","drug","procedure",              "measurement","condition"),   n = c(25,30,20,89,64,45,91,0),   status = c(rep("ok",7),"handled-error") ))

title: Validation: cohorts, datasets, and methodology
text: Five cohorts OHDSI Phenotype Library (via sibling omop-phenotype-pipeline project) instantiated mimiciv_omop. four modules ran cohorts 481-849 patients.
code: kbl(data.frame(   phenotype = c("Type 2 diabetes","Cardiac valve + AF","Acute liver injury",                 "Drug-induced pancreatitis","Treatment-resistant depression"),   cohort_id = c(288, 1103, 736, 253, 1009),   n_target = c(645, 481, 849, 485, 775),   status = "ok (4 checks)" ))

title: Validation: cohorts, datasets, and methodology
text: tool Eunomia/GiBleed returns data-appropriate traffic light: attrition passes (full longitudinal histories) MIMIC fails (ICU-short windows), power adequate large N. Evidence checks reflect real data characteristics rather fixed output.

title: Validation: cohorts, datasets, and methodology
text: harness scripts live data-raw/ source repository (run_battery.R, run_phenotypes.R, run_eunomia.R). part installed package. steps method.

title: Validation: cohorts, datasets, and methodology
text: Production CDMs usually keep vocabulary separate schema. cdm_connect() validates clinical tables cdm_schema vocabulary tables vocab_schema.
code: con <- cdm_connect(   dbname = "FHIR", user = "...", password = "...",   cdm_schema = "mimiciv_omop",   # clinical   vocab_schema = "vocab"          # concept, concept_ancestor )

title: Validation: cohorts, datasets, and methodology
text: mimiciv_omop build ships without observation_period. Derive one row per person spanning first last dated event across clinical domains:
code: DBI::dbExecute(con, "   CREATE TABLE mimiciv_omop.observation_period AS   SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY person_id) AS observation_period_id,          person_id,          MIN(d) AS observation_period_start_date,          MAX(d) AS observation_period_end_date,          44814724 AS period_type_concept_id   FROM (     SELECT person_id, condition_start_date d FROM mimiciv_omop.condition_occurrence     UNION ALL SELECT person_id, drug_exposure_start_date FROM mimiciv_omop.drug_exposure     UNION ALL SELECT person_id, measurement_date FROM mimiciv_omop.measurement     UNION ALL SELECT person_id, procedure_date FROM mimiciv_omop.procedure_occurrence     UNION ALL SELECT person_id, visit_start_date FROM mimiciv_omop.visit_occurrence   ) e WHERE d IS NOT NULL GROUP BY person_id")

title: Validation: cohorts, datasets, and methodology
text: phenotype, expand gold seed concepts descendants via concept_ancestor, remove excluded descendants, index first qualifying event across domains. subject_id NUMERIC mimiciv_omop person ids exceed bigint.
code: DBI::dbExecute(con, "   INSERT INTO results.phenotype_cohorts   SELECT person_id, 288 AS cohort_definition_id, MIN(d), MAX(d) FROM (     SELECT person_id, condition_start_date d FROM mimiciv_omop.condition_occurrence      WHERE condition_concept_id IN (        SELECT descendant_concept_id FROM vocab.concept_ancestor         WHERE ancestor_concept_id IN ( /* gold seeds */ )           AND descendant_concept_id NOT IN (             SELECT descendant_concept_id FROM vocab.concept_ancestor              WHERE ancestor_concept_id IN ( /* excluded */ )))     /* UNION ALL the drug/measurement/procedure domains likewise */   ) e GROUP BY person_id")

title: Validation: cohorts, datasets, and methodology
text: exact seed excluded concept ids five phenotypes ship package can read back: authoritative cohort definitions OHDSI Phenotype Library entries cohort ids 288, 1103, 736, 253, 1009 (https://github.com/OHDSI/PhenotypeLibrary). numeric seed ids recorded , reproducibility; definitions copied.
code: seeds <- read.csv(system.file("extdata", "phenotype_seeds.csv",                               package = "rwevalidate")) kbl(seeds[, c("cohort_id", "phenotype", "n_seed", "n_excluded")]) # Example: the Type 2 diabetes seed concept ids strsplit(seeds$seed_concept_ids[seeds$phenotype == "t2dm"], ";")[[1]] #>  [1] "443238"   "201820"   "442793"   "195771"   "37392407" "4184637"  #>  [7] "40484649" "42689695" "765533"   "43531006" "765650"   "45770986" #> [13] "201254"   "45768456" "40484648" "4128019"  "435216"

title: Validation: cohorts, datasets, and methodology
code: validate_cohort(   cdm_schema   = "mimiciv_omop",   cohort_table = "results.phenotype_cohorts",   cohort_id    = 288,   comparator_id = 10288,           # complement   concept_ids  = c(443238, 201820, 442793),  # seeds -> Module 1   concept_domain = "condition",   vocab_schema = "vocab",   output_dir   = "./validation_report" )

title: Validation: cohorts, datasets, and methodology
text: Summary tables ship inst/extdata/:
code: list.files(system.file("extdata", package = "rwevalidate")) #> [1] "phenotype_seeds.csv"    "phenotype_summary.csv"  "robustness_summary.csv"

code: @Manual{,   title = {rwevalidate: Validate Patient Cohorts for Real-World Evidence Studies on OMOP CDM},   author = {Hamid Tavakoli},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/tavakohr/rwevalidate}, }

what: Validate Patient Cohorts for Real-World Evidence Studies on OMOP CDM
title: Validate Patient Cohorts for Real-World Evidence Studies on OMOP CDM
text: Validate patient cohorts real-world-evidence (RWE) studies OMOP CDM data. One function call produces structured HTML + JSON validation report aligned FDA RWE guidance (Relevance + Reliability) HARPER protocol requirements. Status: v0.1 core complete — attrition (Module 2), temporal density (Module 3), HTML + JSON report, validate_cohort() entry point. Concept coverage (Module 1) covariate feasibility (Module 4) v0.2.

title: Validate Patient Cohorts for Real-World Evidence Studies on OMOP CDM
text: Requires R (>= 4.1) packages Imports DESCRIPTION. HTML rendering needs Pandoc (bundled RStudio; otherwise set RSTUDIO_PANDOC). Without Pandoc JSON sidecar still written.
code: # from a local clone install.packages(".", repos = NULL, type = "source")

title: Validate Patient Cohorts for Real-World Evidence Studies on OMOP CDM
text: Already connection (e.g. DuckDB test instance)? Pass con= left open . Lower-level helpers — cdm_connect(), run_attrition(), run_density(), render_validation_report() — can also called directly.
code: library(rwevalidate)  out <- validate_cohort(   cdm_schema     = "mimic_cdm",                       # clinical schema   cohort_table   = "results.rwevalidate_test_cohort",   cohort_id      = 1,   vocab_schema   = "vocab",                           # vocabulary schema (split-schema CDMs)   obs_window     = c(-365, 0),                        # prior-observation window (attrition)   density_window = c(-365, 365),                      # window for data density   output_dir     = "./validation_report",   # PostgreSQL connection args (omit if passing an open `con=`):   host = "localhost", port = 5432,   dbname = "<your_db>", user = "<your_user>", password = "<your_password>" )  out$flags                  # collected WARN:/FAIL: messages out$report$check_summary   # traffic-light table # -> ./validation_report/validation_report.html  + validation_results.json

title: Validate Patient Cohorts for Real-World Evidence Studies on OMOP CDM
text: Cohort input: instantiated cohort tables (ATLAS JSON parsing v0.1). CDM version: targets v5.3.1 (MIMIC-IV reference environment). Split-schema aware: clinical (cdm_schema) vocabulary (vocab_schema) may live separate schemas. OHDSI tool dependencies: import CohortDiagnostics, DQD, Achilles.

what: Build the traffic-light validation summary table — build_check_summary
title: Build the traffic-light validation summary table — build_check_summary
text: Collects module's flags one row per validation section, mapping regulatory framework section addresses.

title: Build the traffic-light validation summary table — build_check_summary
code: build_check_summary(results)

title: Build the traffic-light validation summary table — build_check_summary
text: results combined results list (named module outputs, e.g. attrition, density). Modules absent list skipped.

title: Build the traffic-light validation summary table — build_check_summary
text: data.frame columns section, status, maps_to, detail.

what: Connect to an OMOP CDM database — cdm_connect
title: Connect to an OMOP CDM database — cdm_connect
text: Opens PostgreSQL connection via RPostgres validates required clinical tables (person, observation_period, condition_occurrence, drug_exposure, measurement, visit_occurrence, death) exist cdm_schema vocabulary tables (concept, concept_ancestor) exist vocab_schema returning. split-schema CDMs (clinical vocabulary different schemas) pass vocab_schema; defaults cdm_schema single-schema builds.

title: Connect to an OMOP CDM database — cdm_connect
code: cdm_connect(   host = "localhost",   port = 5432,   dbname,   user,   password,   cdm_schema,   vocab_schema = cdm_schema )

title: Connect to an OMOP CDM database — cdm_connect
text: host Database host. Default "localhost". port Database port. Default 5432. dbname Database name. user Database user. password Database password. cdm_schema Schema holding clinical CDM tables. vocab_schema Schema holding vocabulary tables. Defaults cdm_schema.

title: Connect to an OMOP CDM database — cdm_connect
text: live DBI connection CDM database.

title: Connect to an OMOP CDM database — cdm_connect
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ con <- cdm_connect(   dbname = "omop", user = "me", password = "secret",   cdm_schema = "mimiciv_omop", vocab_schema = "vocab" ) cdm_disconnect(con) } # }

what: Disconnect from a CDM database — cdm_disconnect
title: Disconnect from a CDM database — cdm_disconnect
text: Disconnect CDM database

title: Disconnect from a CDM database — cdm_disconnect
code: cdm_disconnect(con)

title: Disconnect from a CDM database — cdm_disconnect
text: con live DBI connection returned cdm_connect().

title: Disconnect from a CDM database — cdm_disconnect
text: Invisibly returns result DBI::dbDisconnect().

what: Classify a vector of module flags into a traffic-light status — classify_status
title: Classify a vector of module flags into a traffic-light status — classify_status
text: Flags strings prefixed "FAIL:" "WARN:" (see module functions). FAIL -> "fail" (red); else WARN -> "warn" (amber); else "pass" (green).

title: Classify a vector of module flags into a traffic-light status — classify_status
code: classify_status(flags)

title: Classify a vector of module flags into a traffic-light status — classify_status
text: flags Character vector flag messages (may empty).

title: Classify a vector of module flags into a traffic-light status — classify_status
text: single string: "pass", "warn", "fail".

what: Render the validation report (HTML) and write the JSON sidecar — render_validation_report
title: Render the validation report (HTML) and write the JSON sidecar — render_validation_report
text: Renders bundled R Markdown template self-contained HTML report writes machine-readable validation_results.json alongside .

title: Render the validation report (HTML) and write the JSON sidecar — render_validation_report
code: render_validation_report(   results,   output_dir,   cdm_schema,   cohort_id,   package_version = as.character(utils::packageVersion("rwevalidate")),   run_date = Sys.time(),   quiet = TRUE )

title: Render the validation report (HTML) and write the JSON sidecar — render_validation_report
text: results Combined results list (e.g. list(attrition = ..., density = ...), optionally data_source = ...). output_dir Directory write report (created needed). cdm_schema CDM schema name (report header / JSON). cohort_id Cohort definition id (report header / JSON). package_version Package version string. Defaults installed rwevalidate version. run_date Timestamp run. Defaults base::Sys.time(). quiet Passed rmarkdown::render(). Default TRUE.

title: Render the validation report (HTML) and write the JSON sidecar — render_validation_report
text: Invisibly, list html, json, check_summary.

title: Module 2 - Cohort Attrition Audit — run_attrition
text: Profiles instantiated cohort: size, index-date distribution, prior observation coverage, demographics index. Maps HARPER section 5 RECORD-PE item 6. thresholds arguments.

title: Module 2 - Cohort Attrition Audit — run_attrition
code: run_attrition(   con,   cdm_schema,   cohort_table,   cohort_id,   obs_window = c(-365, 0),   vocab_schema = "vocab",   obs_warn_pct = 70,   obs_fail_pct = 50,   attrition_warn_threshold = 0.5 )

title: Module 2 - Cohort Attrition Audit — run_attrition
text: con live DBI connection (see cdm_connect()). cdm_schema Schema holding clinical CDM tables (e.g. "mimic_cdm"). cohort_table Cohort table, schema-qualified (e.g. "results.rwevalidate_test_cohort"). Must columns subject_id, cohort_definition_id, cohort_start_date, cohort_end_date. cohort_id Integer cohort definition id profile. obs_window Length-2 numeric c(pre, post) days relative index. required prior-observation window abs(obs_window[1]) days (default 365). vocab_schema Schema holding vocabulary tables (concept). split-schema environment clinical schema's concept table empty, gender label resolved vocab_schema. Default "vocab". obs_warn_pct, obs_fail_pct Prior-observation coverage thresholds (percent cohort sufficient prior observation). obs_warn_pct flags WARN, obs_fail_pct flags FAIL. Defaults 70 50. attrition_warn_threshold Reserved stepwise inclusion-criteria attrition (single-criterion drop fraction). exercised v0.1 criteria lists yet supported input. Default 0.5.

title: Module 2 - Cohort Attrition Audit — run_attrition
text: named list: cohort_size integer - distinct subjects cohort index_date_summary data.frame index_year, n obs_coverage data.frame: cohort_n, n_sufficient, pct_sufficient, min_prior_days demographics data.frame: sex, mean_age, min_age, max_age, n flags character vector WARN:/FAIL: messages (empty pass)

title: Module 1 - Concept Coverage — run_concepts
text: Profiles whether cohort-defining concepts present, well-mapped, richly represented CDM. Maps FDA RWE Relevance (data fit question?). first module read vocabulary schema.

title: Module 1 - Concept Coverage — run_concepts
code: run_concepts(   con,   cdm_schema,   cohort_table,   cohort_id,   concept_ids,   domain = "condition",   vocab_schema = "vocab",   prevalence_warn_pct = 10,   prevalence_fail_pct = 1,   unmapped_warn_pct = 20 )

title: Module 1 - Concept Coverage — run_concepts
text: con live DBI connection (see cdm_connect()). cdm_schema Schema holding clinical CDM tables. cohort_table Cohort table, schema-qualified (currently unused; reserved cohort-restricted prevalence later version). cohort_id Integer cohort definition id (reserved, see cohort_table). concept_ids Numeric vector cohort-defining seed concept id(s). descendants expanded via {vocab_schema}.concept_ancestor. domain Domain seed concepts live ; one names internal domain map ("condition", "drug", "measurement", "procedure"). Default "condition". vocab_schema Schema holding vocabulary tables. Default "vocab". prevalence_warn_pct, prevalence_fail_pct Concept-prevalence thresholds (percent CDM persons least one descendant record). warn flags WARN, fail flags FAIL. Defaults 10 1. unmapped_warn_pct Per-domain unmapped-record threshold (percent mapped concept_id = 0) WARN flagged. Default 20.

title: Module 1 - Concept Coverage — run_concepts
text: named list: prevalence data.frame: n_with, n_total, pct ancestor_coverage data.frame: total_descendants, present_descendants, pct_present mapping_by_domain data.frame: domain, n_records, n_unmapped, pct_mapped flags character vector WARN:/FAIL: messages

title: Module 4 - Covariate Feasibility — run_covariates
text: Compares target cohort comparator baseline covariates: standardized mean differences (SMD love-plot data), per-arm prevalence table, simple power calculation. Maps HARPER Sec.4 (comparability). Runs comparator_id supplied.

title: Module 4 - Covariate Feasibility — run_covariates
code: run_covariates(   con,   cdm_schema,   cohort_table,   cohort_id,   comparator_id,   vocab_schema = "vocab",   covariate_window = c(-365, 0),   top_n = 20,   smd_warn_threshold = 0.1,   power_baseline_rate = 0.15,   power_effect_rate = 0.3,   power_sig_level = 0.05 )

title: Module 4 - Covariate Feasibility — run_covariates
text: con live DBI connection (see cdm_connect()). cdm_schema Schema holding clinical CDM tables. cohort_table Cohort table, schema-qualified, containing arms. cohort_id Integer cohort definition id target arm. comparator_id Integer cohort definition id comparator arm. vocab_schema Schema holding vocabulary tables. Default "vocab". covariate_window Length-2 numeric c(pre, post) days defining baseline window relative index comorbidity/drug covariates. Default c(-365, 0). top_n Number top conditions/drugs profile. Default 20. smd_warn_threshold Absolute SMD covariate flagged imbalanced. Default 0.1 (standard). power_baseline_rate, power_effect_rate Assumed comparator target event rates two-proportion power calculation. Defaults 0.15, 0.30. power_sig_level Significance level power calculation. Default 0.05.

title: Module 4 - Covariate Feasibility — run_covariates
text: named list: smd_table, prevalence_table, power, flags.

title: Module 3 - Temporal Data Density — run_density
text: Profiles longitudinal data accrual around index date: record density per patient per month across clinical domains, follow-completeness censoring-reason breakdown. Maps FDA RWE Reliability (data accrual).

title: Module 3 - Temporal Data Density — run_density
code: run_density(   con,   cdm_schema,   cohort_table,   cohort_id,   obs_window = c(-365, 365),   sparse_warn_min = 1 )

title: Module 3 - Temporal Data Density — run_density
text: con live DBI connection (see cdm_connect()). cdm_schema Schema holding clinical CDM tables (e.g. "mimic_cdm"). cohort_table Cohort table, schema-qualified. cohort_id Integer cohort definition id. obs_window Length-2 numeric c(pre, post) days relative index. Density computed records inside [index + pre, index + post]. Default c(-365, 365). sparse_warn_min Minimum total records domain must within window considered present; domains flag WARN (likely missing/sparse domain). Default 1 (flag truly empty domains).

title: Module 3 - Temporal Data Density — run_density
text: named list: density_by_domain data.frame: domain, months_from_index, n_patients, n_records, records_per_patient followup_summary data.frame: one row per censoring_reason n median_followup_days (median group) followup_detail per-subject data.frame: subject_id, effective_end_date, followup_days, censoring_reason flags character vector WARN:/FAIL: messages

what: Validate a patient cohort for real-world-evidence use — validate_cohort
title: Validate a patient cohort for real-world-evidence use — validate_cohort
text: One-call entry point: connects OMOP CDM (uses supplied connection), runs attrition (Module 2) temporal-density (Module 3) checks, produces self-contained HTML report plus JSON sidecar aligned FDA RWE HARPER frameworks.

title: Validate a patient cohort for real-world-evidence use — validate_cohort
code: validate_cohort(   cdm_schema,   cohort_table,   cohort_id = 1,   con = NULL,   vocab_schema = "vocab",   concept_ids = NULL,   concept_domain = "condition",   comparator_id = NULL,   obs_window = c(-365, 0),   density_window = c(-365, 365),   output_dir = "./validation_report",   host = "localhost",   port = 5432,   dbname = NULL,   user = NULL,   password = NULL,   render_html = TRUE,   quiet = TRUE )

title: Validate a patient cohort for real-world-evidence use — validate_cohort
text: cdm_schema Schema holding clinical CDM tables (e.g. "mimic_cdm"). cohort_table Cohort table, schema-qualified (e.g. "results.rwevalidate_test_cohort"). cohort_id Integer cohort definition id. Default 1. con Optional open DBI connection. NULL (default) one opened connection arguments closed exit. vocab_schema Schema holding vocabulary tables. Default "vocab". Required clinical schema's concept table may empty split-schema builds. concept_ids Optional numeric vector cohort-defining seed concept id(s). supplied, Module 1 (concept coverage) runs populates report Section 2. NULL (default) Module 1 skipped. concept_domain Domain seed concepts live ("condition", "drug", "measurement", "procedure"). Default "condition". comparator_id Optional integer cohort definition id comparator arm. supplied, Module 4 (covariate feasibility) runs populates report Section 5. NULL (default) Module 4 skipped. obs_window Length-2 numeric c(pre, post) days attrition prior observation. Default c(-365, 0). density_window Length-2 numeric c(pre, post) days density. Default c(-365, 365). output_dir Directory report + JSON. Default "./validation_report". host, port, dbname, user, password PostgreSQL connection arguments, used con NULL. render_html Render HTML report. Default TRUE. Pandoc unavailable, JSON sidecar written (warning). quiet Passed rmarkdown::render(). Default TRUE.

title: Validate a patient cohort for real-world-evidence use — validate_cohort
text: Invisibly, list results (module outputs + data_source), report (paths + check summary), flags (collected flags).

title: Validate a patient cohort for real-world-evidence use — validate_cohort
text: Supply either open con (e.g. DuckDB testing) PostgreSQL connection arguments (dbname, user, password, ...). Connections opened internally closed exit; connection passed via con left open.

title: Validate a patient cohort for real-world-evidence use — validate_cohort
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ validate_cohort(   cdm_schema   = "mimic_cdm",   cohort_table = "results.rwevalidate_test_cohort",   cohort_id    = 1,   dbname = "FHIR", user = "me", password = "secret",   vocab_schema = "vocab",   output_dir   = "./validation_report" ) } # }

what: Write the JSON sidecar (no rendering) — write_results_json
title: Write the JSON sidecar (no rendering) — write_results_json
text: Exposed separately results can persisted even Pandoc unavailable HTML rendering.

title: Write the JSON sidecar (no rendering) — write_results_json
code: write_results_json(   results,   output_dir,   cdm_schema,   cohort_id,   package_version = as.character(utils::packageVersion("rwevalidate")),   run_date = Sys.time(),   check_summary = NULL )

title: Write the JSON sidecar (no rendering) — write_results_json
text: results Combined results list (e.g. list(attrition = ..., density = ...), optionally data_source = ...). output_dir Directory write report (created needed). cdm_schema CDM schema name (report header / JSON). cohort_id Cohort definition id (report header / JSON). package_version Package version string. Defaults installed rwevalidate version. run_date Timestamp run. Defaults base::Sys.time(). check_summary Optional pre-built summary; rebuilt NULL.

title: Write the JSON sidecar (no rendering) — write_results_json
text: path written JSON file (invisibly).

title: rwevalidate 0.1.0
text: First public release. rwevalidate validates instantiated OMOP CDM cohort real-world-evidence use produces regulator-aligned HTML + JSON report single validate_cohort() call.

title: rwevalidate 0.1.0
text: cdm_connect() / cdm_disconnect() - open PostgreSQL CDM connection validate required clinical tables exist (split-schema aware). Module 1 - run_concepts() - concept prevalence, ancestor coverage, per-domain vocabulary mapping rate (FDA Relevance). Module 2 - run_attrition() - cohort size, index-date distribution, prior-observation coverage, demographics index (HARPER / RECORD-PE). Module 3 - run_density() - records per patient per month domain follow-completeness censoring breakdown (FDA Reliability). Module 4 - run_covariates() - standardized mean differences (love plot), per-arm prevalence, power calculation comparator (HARPER). Reporting - render_validation_report() writes self-contained HTML report traffic-light summary plus machine-readable validation_results.json sidecar; write_results_json() works without Pandoc. validate_cohort() - one entry point wires connection, modules, report. Accepts open con PostgreSQL connection arguments; concept_ids enables Module 1, comparator_id enables Module 4.

title: rwevalidate 0.1.0
text: Targets OMOP CDM v5.3.1. Validated MIMIC-IV PostgreSQL synthetic DuckDB mock used test suite. dependency CohortDiagnostics, DataQualityDashboard, Achilles. thresholds documented, configurable function arguments.
